([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Донецька міська громада) is a [hromada](/wiki/Hromada "Hromada") of [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), located in [Donetsk Raion](/wiki/Donetsk_Raion "Donetsk Raion"), [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast"). Its administrative center is the city [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Hromada in Donetsk Oblast, Ukraine

| Donetsk urban hromada  Донецька міська громада | |
| --- | --- |
| [Hromada](/wiki/Hromada "Hromada") | |
| Map Interactive map of Donetsk urban hromada | |
| [Country](/wiki/List_of_sovereign_states "List of sovereign states") | Ukraine |
| [Oblast](/wiki/Oblasts_of_Ukraine "Oblasts of Ukraine") | [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast") |
| [Raion](/wiki/Raions_of_Ukraine "Raions of Ukraine") | [Donetsk Raion](/wiki/Donetsk_Raion "Donetsk Raion") |
| Settlements | 14 |
| [Cities](/wiki/City_status_in_Ukraine "City status in Ukraine") | 2 |
| [Villages](/wiki/Village_(Ukraine) "Village (Ukraine)") | 8 |
| [Towns](/wiki/Urban-type_settlements_in_Ukraine "Urban-type settlements in Ukraine") | 4 |

**Donetsk urban hromada** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Донецька міська громада) is a [hromada](/wiki/Hromada "Hromada") of [Ukraine](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine"), located in [Donetsk Raion](/wiki/Donetsk_Raion "Donetsk Raion"), [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast"). Its administrative center is the city [Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The hromada contains 14 settlements: 2 cities ([Donetsk](/wiki/Donetsk "Donetsk") and [Mospyne](/wiki/Mospyne "Mospyne")), 4 rural settlements ([Horbachevo-Mykhailivka](/wiki/Horbachevo-Mykhailivka "Horbachevo-Mykhailivka"), [Laryne](/wiki/Laryne,_Donetsk_Oblast "Laryne, Donetsk Oblast"), [Oleksandrivka](/wiki/Oleksandrivka,_Donetsk_Raion,_Donetsk_Oblast "Oleksandrivka, Donetsk Raion, Donetsk Oblast"), and [Staromykhailivka](/wiki/Staromykhailivka "Staromykhailivka")), and 8 villages:[[2]](#cite_note-2)

* [Byriuky](/w/index.php?title=Byriuky,_Donetsk_Oblast&action=edit&redlink=1 "Byriuky, Donetsk Oblast (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%91%D0%B8%D1%80%D1%8E%D0%BA%D0%B8_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD) "uk:Бирюки (Донецький район)")]
* [Hryshky](/w/index.php?title=Hryshky,_Donetsk_Oblast&action=edit&redlink=1 "Hryshky, Donetsk Oblast (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%93%D1%80%D0%B8%D1%88%D0%BA%D0%B8_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD) "uk:Гришки (Донецький район)")]
* [Kyslyche](/w/index.php?title=Kyslyche&action=edit&redlink=1 "Kyslyche (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9A%D0%B8%D1%81%D0%BB%D0%B8%D1%87%D0%B5 "uk:Кисличе")]
* [Mykhailivka](/w/index.php?title=Mykhailivka,_Donetsk_urban_hromada,_Donetsk_Raion,_Donetsk_Oblast&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mykhailivka, Donetsk urban hromada, Donetsk Raion, Donetsk Oblast (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9C%D0%B8%D1%85%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BB%D1%96%D0%B2%D0%BA%D0%B0_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD) "uk:Михайлівка (Донецький район)")]
* [Novodvirske](/w/index.php?title=Novodvirske&action=edit&redlink=1 "Novodvirske (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9D%D0%BE%D0%B2%D0%BE%D0%B4%D0%B2%D1%96%D1%80%D1%81%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B5 "uk:Новодвірське")]
* [Pavlohradske](/w/index.php?title=Pavlohradske&action=edit&redlink=1 "Pavlohradske (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%9F%D0%B0%D0%B2%D0%BB%D0%BE%D0%B3%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B4%D1%81%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B5 "uk:Павлоградське")]
* [Temriuk](/w/index.php?title=Temriuk,_Donetsk_Oblast&action=edit&redlink=1 "Temriuk, Donetsk Oblast (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%A2%D0%B5%D0%BC%D1%80%D1%8E%D0%BA_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD) "uk:Темрюк (Донецький район)")]
* [Verbova Balka](/w/index.php?title=Verbova_Balka,_Donetsk_Oblast&action=edit&redlink=1 "Verbova Balka, Donetsk Oblast (page does not exist)") [[uk](https://uk.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D0%92%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%B1%D0%BE%D0%B2%D0%B0_%D0%91%D0%B0%D0%BB%D0%BA%D0%B0_(%D0%94%D0%BE%D0%BD%D0%B5%D1%86%D1%8C%D0%BA%D0%B8%D0%B9_%D1%80%D0%B0%D0%B9%D0%BE%D0%BD) "uk:Вербова Балка (Донецький район)")]
